ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sale occurred */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the sale occurred */,
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of item sold */,
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel used */,
  "order_priority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order priority */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of the item */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "total_profit" REAL /* Total profit generated from the sale */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson who handled the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was recorded */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency used in the transaction */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the sales transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("sales_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_item_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_order_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_priority_id") REFERENCES order_priorities ("order_priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Australia and Oceania) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "head_office_location" TEXT /* Location of the head office in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., Tuvalu) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate in the country */,
  "shipping_tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to shipping in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "item_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type (e.g., Baby Food) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item type */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the item (e.g., kg, units) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "sales_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "sales_channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., Offline, Online) */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the sales channel */,
  "channel_status" TEXT /* Status of the sales channel (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_priorities" (
  "order_priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order priority */,
  "order_priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the order priority (e.g., H, C, L) */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Numerical level of the priority (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., Individual, Business) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespeople" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "salesperson_name" TEXT /* Name of the salesperson */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesperson */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the salesperson operates in */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the salesperson belongs to */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the salesperson */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the salesperson was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salespeople_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for the item */,
  "maximum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level for the item */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Next restock date */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_details" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales transaction */,
  "ship_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., FedEx, UPS) */,
  "ship_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the carrier used for shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "return_policy" TEXT /* Return policy for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_details_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_details_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the carrier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)
